title: dipterocarpus conformis subsp. borneensis
intro: Dipterocarpus conformis subsp. borneensis, also known as the Bornean Dipterocarp, is a species of tree that belongs to the family Dipterocarpaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain and inflammation, and treat various infections. The herbal preparations of Dipterocarpus conformis subsp. borneensis often involve infusions, decoctions, or tinctures made from the bark, leaves, or roots of the plant.
